"Engineering is art with a purpose — every circuit is a canvas, every line of code a brushstroke shaping the world." — Vaishnavi's Motto

🌍 I believe the best discoveries happen when you wander off the map — whether that's a mountain trail, a new city, or an unexplored idea. Traveling fuels my curiosity, and curiosity fuels my engineering. Every journey teaches me something I could never learn in a classroom.

What I've Built

Projects

Electronics
Magnetic Door Alarm

A smart security system using a magnetic reed switch and buzzer circuit. When the door opens, the circuit breaks and triggers the alarm — a practical IoT application built from scratch.

Electronics
Electronics Workshop Project

Hands-on electronics workshop project demonstrating real-world circuit design and prototyping skills developed during first-year engineering lab sessions.

Structural Engg.
Popsicle Stick Bridge

A structural engineering challenge — designed and built a load-bearing bridge using popsicle sticks with triangular truss patterns to maximize strength-to-weight ratio.

IoT · Tinkercad
Smart Soil Moisture System

Arduino-based automated irrigation controller using a soil moisture sensor and relay. Simulated in Tinkercad — reads soil wetness and auto-controls water supply to prevent over/under-watering.
